MAPARTIST-GENERAL_SETTINGS.title: General Settings
MAPARTIST-TOP_LEFT_GUI.title: Top Left GUI
MAPARTIST-TOP_LEFT_GUI.hover.desc: Displays the color picker and buttons in the top left of the screen
MAPARTIST-COLOR_SAMPLER_TOOL.title: Color Sampler Tool
MAPARTIST-COLOR_SAMPLER_TOOL.hover.desc: Enable and display the color sampler in the GUI
MAPARTIST-EXPERIMENTAL_SETTINGS.title: Experimental Settings
MAPARTIST-USE_VANILLA_ERASER.title: Use Vanilla Eraser
MAPARTIST-USE_VANILLA_ERASER.hover.desc: WARNING: this option will likely result in inconsistent eraser behavior with custom colors.
MAPARTIST-SUPPRESS_VANILLA_GAME_DRAWING_: Suppress Vanilla Game Drawing Buttons Exception
Suppresses an exception commonly thrown in the vanilla game when interacting with the drawing buttons. Safe to toggle.
